calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Matthew B. Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Richard Johnson, Clifford Parr and Vincent Taglieri, who were not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Hamilton Materials, Inc.

Default entered against defendant on April 2, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, July 24, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witnesses at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 17, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Richard Johnson, Clifford Parr and Vincent Taglieri, and against the Defaulted Defendant Haminton Materials, Inc. as follows:

Interest as to Plaintiff Richard Johson - $95.89.
Interest as to Plaintiff Clifford Parr - $287.67.
Interest as to Plaintiff Vincent Taglieri - $287.67.
Costs - $380.,00, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,051.23.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
